articles.title: Texas man intentionally drove his Tesla Cybertruck into Grapevine Lake to use vehicle's "wade mode", police say - ABC7 Los Angeles
articles.description: First responders in Texas had to remove a Tesla Cybertruck from a lake after a man intentionally drove it into the water to test its 'wade' mode. The truck was disabled and took on water, prompting the driver and passenger to abandon it, according to police.
